use_cases: Displaying syntax-highlighted code snippets in developer documentation
Showing code examples in technical tutorials and blog posts
Rendering code samples in SaaS product interfaces and dashboards
Presenting code demonstrations in educational and learning platforms
Building code reference panels in IDE-like web applications
ai_summary: A syntax-highlighted code block component that uses Shiki for language-aware code rendering with support for multiple programming languages and themes. Features a clean, card-based layout with rounded borders and overflow handling for long code snippets. The composite component structure allows flexible grouping of code blocks with optional headers and metadata.
